name: nightshift
description: Multi-agent development plugin on top of Claude Code + Codex CLI — describe a project in chat, sleep, wake up to a reviewed, deployed implementation with full audit trail.
author: ksokolovsky

scripts.test: node --test core/event-store/test/*.test.mjs core/scripts/test/*.test.mjs core/secrets/test/*.test.mjs core/provisioners/test/*.test.mjs core/codex/test/*.test.mjs core/registry/test/*.test.mjs claude/hooks/test/*.test.mjs
